query: SELECT r.id, r.tmdbId, r.mediaType, r.title as reviewTitle, u.name as userName, vh.title as contentTitle, w.title as watchlistTitle FROM reviews r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.userId = u.id LEFT JOIN viewing_history vh ON r.tmdbId = vh.tmdbId AND r.mediaType = vh.mediaType LEFT JOIN watchlist w ON r.tmdbId = w.tmdbId AND r.mediaType = w.mediaType ORDER BY r.createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2ZhujiYnxXczSgu.root --database Cvg8278ofufQzThj4s4h83 --execute SELECT r.id, r.tmdbId, r.mediaType, r.title as reviewTitle, u.name as userName, vh.title as contentTitle, w.title as watchlistTitle FROM reviews r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.userId = u.id LEFT JOIN viewing_history vh ON r.tmdbId = vh.tmdbId AND r.mediaType = vh.mediaType LEFT JOIN watchlist w ON r.tmdbId = w.tmdbId AND r.mediaType = w.mediaType ORDER BY r.createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
